‹ GalNet Chronicle
Entity Profile
P

Archon Delaine

Person · First seen 3304-04-14 · 32 mentions
Active: 3304-04-14 → 3311-06-26
Mentions Timeline (32 articles)
3311-06-26
Battle at Beta-3 Tucani Ends, Empire Declares Victory
The conflict between Imperial forces and Archon Delaine in Beta-3 Tucani concluded with an Imperial victory. Imperial Intelligence forced the Mictlan megaship to retreat, and an agent hacked its internal holoscreens to display Imperial propaganda.
3311-06-12
Imperial Forces Target Delaine Flagship
Imperial forces launch a surprise assault on Archon Delaine's flagship, the Mictlan, in Beta-3 Tucani. The attack responds to Delaine's boasts following assassination attempts on Emperor Arissa and Shadow President Jerome Archer in August 3310.
3310-11-07
A New Dawn for Humanity?
Political analysts assess the post-Thargoid war balance of power across the core systems, with Winters facing domestic challenges, Arissa and Patreus strengthened in the Empire, and Mahon facing opposition from Kaine in the Alliance.
3310-08-22
Kumo Crew Claims Responsibility for Nanomam 1 Explosion
The Kumo Crew claims responsibility for an explosion targeting Shadow President-elect Jerome Archer on Nanomam 1, also implying responsibility for the earlier ambush on Emperor Arissa.
3309-08-22
The Case Against ‘Calico Zack’
Bryanna Blanco renews her investigation into Zachary Rackham's alleged pirate past as 'Calico Zack', detailing his rise from pirate lord to trillionaire entrepreneur.
3309-03-09
Archon Delaine Counters Mahon’s Rebuke
Archon Delaine rejects Mahon's accusations, hinting at Sirius Corporation and Rackham Capital Investments connections to his operations in the California Nebula.
3309-03-07
Alliance Sends Warning to Kumo Crew
The Alliance formally condemns the Kumo Crew's attempted takeover of California Nebula systems under the guise of anti-xeno defense, with Mahon warning Archon Delaine.
3309-02-09
Kumo Crew Rebuffed after Anti-Xeno Campaign
The Kumo Crew's defence of the California Nebula succeeds, but its attempt to seize control of local ports is repelled by communities and the Turner Research Group.
3309-02-02
Pirates Lead Counter-Attack Against Thargoids
The Kumo Crew organises a counter-attack against Thargoid invaders in the California Nebula while attempting to expand its influence over local ports.
3309-01-27
Delaine Vows to Defend California Nebula
Archon Delaine mobilizes the Kumo Crew to defend the California Nebula from Thargoid invasions, drawing skepticism from the Turner Research Group.
3308-12-30
A Retrospective of 3308 (Part Two)
Sima Kalhana continues her review of the most significant historical events that occurred during the past year.
3308-07-15
Azimuth's Plan Elicits Further Reactions
Prominent political figures including Archon Delaine, Yuri Grom, Zemina Torval, Hadrian Duval, Octavia Volkov, and Jasmina Halsey offer contrasting perspectives on Salvation's Proteus Wave operation in HIP 22460.
3308-06-01
The Plot to Depose Archon Delaine
Details emerge about Vidar Trask's failed coup against Archon Delaine, masterminded with Kay Volantyne of the Blue Viper Club dredger clan.
3308-05-26
Kumo Crew Crushes Rebellion
The Kumo Crew defeats Vidar Trask's rebel forces in the HIP 10792 system, ending the coup attempt.
3308-05-24
Piratical Dredger Clan Departs
The Blue Viper Club dredger clan severs ties with the Kumo Crew and departs with Kay Volantyne.
3308-05-19
Archon Delaine Seeks to Destroy Pirate Rebels
Archon Delaine declares open warfare on the Trask Death Corsairs in the HIP 10792 system.
3308-05-16
Pirate Rebels Coup Attempt Fails
Vidar Trask's coup attempt against Archon Delaine fails, with surviving rebels retreating to HIP 10792.
3308-05-11
Archon Delaine Faces Pirate Rebellion
A coordinated coup attempt led by Arch-Corsair Vidar Trask threatens to overthrow Archon Delaine's control of the Kumo Crew.
3308-04-26
Kumo Crew Appoints New Council Leader
Archon Delaine appoints Callan Salamanca as a new arch-corsair on the Kumo Council.
3307-12-28
A Retrospective of 3307 (Part One)
Historian Sima Kalhana reviews the first quarter of 3307, covering the NMLA's rise, the Galactic Summit, the Nine Martyrs bombings, and the formation of ACT.
3307-09-09
Archon Delaine Retaliates Against Pharma Giant
The Kumo Council declares war on Haithis Purple Dynamic Group for supporting Neomedical Industries' Onionhead medical production project.
3307-08-03
Superpowers Respond to New Onionhead
The Alliance, Empire, and Federation clarify their official positions on Onionhead gamma strain, with the Federation and Empire maintaining bans while the Alliance defers to local authorities.
3307-07-23
New Onionhead Variant Reaches the Market
Onionhead gamma strain (helix) enters the market in selected industrial anarchy systems. Journalist Adalyn Cross reports it is marketed for medicinal use but remains illegal outside anarchy jurisdictions. Concerns arise about Sirius Corporation potentially ferrying shipments via its freight network, which the company denies.
3307-07-15
Kumo Crew Campaign Starts Drug Production
The Kumo Crew procures enough materials to mass-produce helix, confirmed by the IHO as a new variant of onionhead. President Hudson, Princess Aisling and other leaders express outrage. Archon Delaine defends the drug as bringing happiness and income to his people.
3307-07-08
Kumo Crew Initiative to Produce New Commodity
The Kumo Crew syndicate requests deliveries to mass-produce 'helix', a recreational drug believed to originate from the Blue Viper Club dredger. Arch-Corsair Kay Volantyne claims it has medicinal and psychological benefits. Authorities express concern about drug addiction, with rumours suggesting helix may be a new strain of onionhead.
3307-07-02
Dredger Clan Arrives at Kumo City
A Blue Viper Club dredger enters the Pegasi Sector PN-T c3-14 system and takes position near Kumo City. Francesca Wolfe reports the clan's unsavoury reputation for drug running and raiding. Unmarked personnel shuttles travel between the dredger and Kumo City, suggesting a potential alliance with the Kumo Crew.
3307-06-15
Sirius Corporation: The Fourth Superpower?
Business analyst Marlon Royce examines Sirius Corporation's growing political influence, from resettling Marlinist refugees and hosting the Galactic Summit to secret deals with the Kumo Crew and terraforming the Coalsack Nebula. The article questions whether the megacorp aims to become a de facto fourth superpower.
3307-05-13
Mass Thargoid Strike – Emergency Declared
Thargoid forces invade the Delphi system and multiple systems in the California, Coalsack and Pleiades Nebulas. Professor Alba Tesreau speculates the attack on Delphi was triggered by Guardian artefacts delivered for Aegis research. Two newly constructed Kumo Crew starports are heavily damaged.
3307-04-30
Kumo Crew Starports Open for Business
Five new Kumo Crew starports become fully operational across the galaxy. Arch-Corsair Kay Volantyne claims they encourage legitimate trade, though neighbouring systems fear black market activity. Subsidiaries of Sirius Corporation appear in all five systems, fuelling speculation about financial ties to the syndicate.
3307-04-22
Archon Delaine Starport Campaign Concludes
The Kumo Crew's starport construction campaign concludes successfully. Five new Orbis stations will open across the galaxy including locations near the California Nebula, Sothis, Coalsack Nebula, and Colonia. Archon Delaine threatens "creative reprisals" against those who interfered.
3307-04-15
Archon Delaine Campaign to Build New Starports
The Kumo Crew syndicate launches a campaign to construct up to five new Orbis starports in uninhabited systems near key trading regions. Archon Delaine extends his protection racket into new territories while placing bounties on anyone interfering with the project.
3304-04-14
Pirates vs Thargoids
Dr Jin Rameer of an independent socio-political think tank published a report suggesting piracy has declined since the Thargoids' return, proposing that the alien threat has either strengthened community bonds or redirected criminals toward fighting non-human targets. However, security forces in the Pegasi Sector refuted this, stating the Kumo Crew has raided dozens of systems while security forces are tied up with the Thargoids.
